title: Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Agenda 03-10-23
body: Agenda Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Friday, March 10, 2023, 9:00 a.m. to 10:00 a.m. Microsoft Teams 9:00 am. – 9:05 am: Welcome, introductions, and selecting meeting minutes volunteer Select a meeting minutes volunteer 9:05 am – 9:10 am: Approve meeting minutes for February 9:10 am – 9:15 am: Mentor-Mentee Match ( Justin, Alex, Alissa, Kendra) Any questions or topics for the committee? 9:15 a.m. to 9:45 a.m.: Events ( Liza, Tarakee, Vanessa, Carmen) Debrief on 03/03 Social Gathering Review and reflect Chat about in person and virtual event experiences Take some time to celebrate Prep after event survey Create a thank you note for Jake and Lesley Plan upcoming event: Professional development event in April Event checklist Request for space Brainstorm an agenda Refine the space needs. Need to share with Lesley Start outreach and creating materials (e.g. invite) 9:45 a.m. to 9:55 a.m.:  Resources ( Kendra, Peter, Tarakee, Alissa) Check-in with resources committee LinkedIn Group: discuss timeline for deleting the old group 9:55 am to 10:00 a.m.: Q&A and Open Discussion & Kudos via Microsoft Teams 10:00 am: Adjourn
